info.name: Inter Fonts
info.summary: Replaces every Nextcloud interface font with Inter — self-hosted, zero external requests
info.description:
# Inter Fonts
Switches every font in the Nextcloud interface to **Inter**, a highly-legible typeface designed specifically for computer screens by Rasmus Andersson.
## Features
- **Zero external requests** — the Inter variable font is fully self-hosted inside the app, no Google Fonts, no CDN - **Single variable font** covers every weight from 100 to 900 (roman + italic) - **Zero FOUT** — both WOFF2 files are preloaded with `<link rel="preload">` so the font is in cache before paint - **Zero CLS** — a metric-compatible synthetic Arial fallback matches Inter's vertical metrics until the real font swaps in - **Works on every page** including the login form, public share pages, password recovery, and the Impersonate / Guests apps - **Works in sub-directory installs** via runtime URL generation through `IURLGenerator` - **Cache-safe across upgrades** — font filenames embed the upstream Inter version, so a new release automatically becomes a new URL - **Covers the whole UI**: navigation, file lists, modals, popovers, login boxes, dashboards, and more - **Tabular numerals** on file sizes and timestamps so digits stay vertically aligned
## Credits
The **Inter** typeface is created by [Rasmus Andersson](https://rsms.me/inter/) and licensed under the [SIL Open Font License 1.1](https://scripts.sil.org/OFL).
The app itself is licensed under [AGPL-3.0-or-later](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/agpl-3.0.html).
info.author: solracsf
